---
title: "Test Lecture"
date: today
description: '<a href="lectures/test_lecture.pdf" download>Download PDF</a>'
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
---

## Welcome to SEM

Question: What's the best kind of stats?

::: {.content-visible when-profile="teacher"}
::: {.fragment}
Answer: Multivariate
:::
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="teacher"}
::: {.notes}
ask students to introduce themselves
:::
:::
